goal: Add a tap-to-preview popup (Fool card + unlock condition) in the Shop and the achievements/streak list, and fix 'Your decks shows only Moonmallow' for a signed-in user
done: (1) NEW shared js/deck-preview.js — showDeckPreview(deck,{lang,buildCondition}): centred popup on a dimmed backdrop showing the deck's sample face card (01-the-fool-upright, full-res w/ fallback to 00-back) labelled 'Preview · The Fool', deck name EN+TH, a divider, then a caller-built condition area; spring-in, tap-outside/close. Self-injected styles (.mt-dp-*). (2) shop.js: tapping a deck's art/name opens the preview; its condition area shows price + an Unlock(buy) button (or 'Owned'), buy closes the popup on success. (3) achievements-panel.js: tapping a milestone row opens the preview; condition shows the streak unlock requirement + progress ('Unlocks at a 45-day streak — you're on day 12') or 'Unlocked {date}'. (4) BUGFIX 'Your decks only Moonmallow': my earlier owned-only filter hid veila-tarot/pawbit the instant getCurrentUserSync() was null (auth still resolving / session-restore / cross-origin), because canUnlockDeck gates non-default decks on sign-in. Added a PERSISTED owned-deck set (localStorage meowtarot_owned_decks, mirrors purchased-decks): canUnlockDeck records a deck the first time it's confirmed unlocked while signed in (gift / default / streak-day-met) and thereafter returns true for it via the sticky set — so a deck the user has earned no longer vanishes across auth/origin blips. Cache-bust 20260622a -> 20260622b; www synced. ALSO delivered (non-code): ~/Downloads/MeowShop_Design_Prompt.md — a Claude Design brief for Shop + Your Decks + the two popups.
root_cause: owned-only Your-decks filter depended on canUnlockDeck, which returns false for default/gifted decks whenever getCurrentUserSync() is momentarily null.
fix: sticky localStorage ownership set honoured by canUnlockDeck; + shared deck-preview popup wired into shop + achievements.
verified: headless: preview popup renders the Siam Paws Fool card + name(EN/TH) + 'Unlock for 100 Meow Coins' + Unlock button
